overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving on a snowy highway at night. The windshield wipers actively clear heavy snowfall as the truck navigates curved highway sections with occasional traffic. Game engine footage from a truck simulator with detailed dashboard instrumentation and weather effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy multi-lane highway with overhead bridge

events.description: windshield wipers begin active sweeping motion to clear heavy snow
white sedan overtakes in the left lane and passes by

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the snowy highway, maintaining lane position with active wipers clearing the windshield

notable_agents.action: white sedan overtaking on the left in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: metal guardrail covered in snow along the right shoulder of the highway
blue circular parking sign with white P symbol
concrete overpass bridge spanning across the highway lanes
large snow pile along the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a straight snowy highway at night with active windshield wipers. A metal guardrail lines the right side while a parking sign and overhead bridge appear ahead. A white sedan overtakes on the left as the truck maintains steady speed through the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway section with concrete barriers

events.description: highway guardrail transitions to concrete barrier as the road curves right
yellow truck appears ahead in the same lane, moving slower

agents.ego_description: navigating a right-hand curve on the snowy highway, following the yellow truck ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow truck driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights occasionally visible

entered.detail: tall concrete divider wall separating the highway lanes on the right side
green directional highway sign with white text indicating exits

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a right-hand curve where the guardrail gives way to concrete barriers. A green highway sign appears ahead while a yellow truck drives slowly in the same lane ahead. The snow embankment on the left moves closer as the truck navigates the curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway curve with tunnel structure and guardrails

events.description: truck passes under a covered tunnel or overpass structure
steering adjusts for sharp left curve in the highway

agents.ego_description: navigating a sharp left curve through a partially covered highway section, maintaining distance from the yellow truck

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving in the right lane, parallel to the truck

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure covering the highway temporarily
metal guardrail now appearing on the left side of the vehicle

segments.scene_description: The truck drives through a tunnel-like structure and navigates a sharp left curve. The concrete barrier exits to the right while a guardrail appears on the left. Snow banks shift to the right side as the truck curves, and a red sedan appears in the right lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy highway with multiple vehicles

events.description: truck overtakes the red car on the left
truck straightens out and accelerates on the final stretch

agents.ego_description: accelerating on a straight section, overtaking slower traffic and maintaining high speed through the snow

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead in the distance with taillights visible

entered.detail: large overhead gantry sign spanning across the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The truck exits the curve and accelerates on a straight section of highway, overtaking the red car. An overhead gantry sign appears in the distance while the guardrail continues along the left. The truck maintains high speed through the continuing snowfall as other vehicles appear ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a snowy highway through a series of curves and straightaways at night. It begins on a straight stretch of road with active windshield wipers clearing heavy snow, passing a metal guardrail and an overhead bridge as a white sedan overtakes on the left. As the truck enters a right-hand curve, the guardrail shifts to concrete barriers and the camera follows a slow-moving yellow truck toward a green highway sign. The scene then transitions through a tunnel-like structure into a sharp left curve, where the concrete barriers vanish and snow banks shift to the right as a red sedan appears. Finally, the truck exits the curve and accelerates onto a straight section, overtaking the red car and heading toward a distant overhead gantry sign amidst the continuing snowfall.
